name: Kensuke Aida
description: Kensuke Aida is an otaku, a military buff, Toji's best friend, and one of the "Other Children," Eva pilot candidates in the same class as Shinji, Toji, Rei, Asuka, and Hikari. His hobbies include camping in the mountains surrounding Tokyo-3 and playing at simulated war reenacting - by himself. Kensuke solidifies his friendship with Shinji after Shinji saves him and Toji during the fight against the fourth Angel, Shamshel. Kensuke dreams of becoming an Eva pilot and ceaselessly begs Shinji to pul

name: Kinemon
description: __Height:__ 295 cm (9'8") __Affiliation:__ Kozuki Family __Devil Fruit:__ ~!Fuku Fuku no Mi (Garb-Garb Fruit)!~ __Devil Fruit Type:__ ~!Paramecia!~ Foxfire Kinemon (狐火の錦えもん Kitsune-bi no Kin'emon) is a samurai from Wano Country whom the Straw Hat Pirates found in various pieces at Punk Hazard. Kinemon seems to follow the code of bushido, claiming he would commit suicide if he could, for the disgrace of being dismembered without dying. name: Knives Millions
nativeName: ミリオンズ・ナイブズ
description: As Trigun unfolds, it becomes apparent that Knives believes that humans are parasites that need to be exterminated. He wants to create a peaceful and fair world with Vash and his other plant brethren, and he believes the only way to do this is by killing off all humans. Knives never claims to be a god; simply a superior being to homosapiens. If Knives were able to kill all humans and begin creating his "Eden" on Gunsmoke, it is very likely that he would act similarly to Vash, and act as a kind a
searchTerms: ミリオンズ・ナイブズ

name: Mayumi Doujima
description: The one and only female member of the Pretty Boy Detective Club. Mayumi is a beautiful girl, though she cross-dresses when in the club. Students often call her literal starry eyes beautiful, though she does not like being called beautiful at all. Due to this, she wears glasses to make her starry eyes less prominent.

name: Miu Amano
description: **Height:** 163 cm (5'4") **Character:** Big Sister She normally wears glasses and is active in a doujin circle. She is the "older sister" waitress at Stile, but surprisingly, she is easily excitable.

name: Otoha Kurogane
description: Beautiful and well mannered, she is the daughter of Kijuro Kurogane of the Kurogane family, which has produced many prime ministers since the Meiji era and whose influence extends to politics and business. She is a drummer.

name: Saeko Sawatari
description: Whether concerts or theme parks, she just like things that stimulate her. She dresses like she doesn't really care. Despite that, women love her.

name: Arin Kannazuki
description: __Archive:__ Ira (wrath) __Thema:__ ruina, paratum, victoria (temporary) __Grimoire:__ Laguna Yggdrasil A mysterious girl who claims Arata to be her husband. She looks like Hijiri, Arata's cousin and childhood friend. Arin rarely shows emotion, and cares little what others think of her. name: Azusa Murasaka
description: She is one of Naho's best friend who supports her throughout the series. She is often seen arguing with Hagita, but has a cheerful personality. Azusa is shown to be cheerful, playful, bright, and kind to her friends. She accepted many of the nicknames she received in middle school, proving her to be open-minded to most things. Though, she may be mischievous at times.

name: Fitoria
description: Fitoria is the queen of the Filolials, who rules over them all. She has silver hair with thin streaks of light blue, cut in a short bob with three tufts of hair standing up vertically from the crown of her head, like cowlicks. Her eyes are red and her face is small and well composed. She's dressed in a red and white gothic lolita-style dress. She's about the same height as Filo.

name: Koharu Hondoumachi
description: Koharu Hondoumachi is one of the protagonists of ID:Invaded. She assists [Matsuoka](https://anilist.co/character/145232/Kokuryuu-Matsuoka) in tracking down serial killers in the field. ~!After incidents involving [Tamotsu Fukuda](https://anilist.co/character/154397/Fukuda-Tamotsu) and [Haruka Kazuta](https://anilist.co/character/161511/Haruka-Kazuta), she becomes one of the brilliant detectives under the name Miyo Hijiriido.!~

name: Seele Vollerei
description: __Height:__ 149 cm (before X-10) An orphaned girl who became Bronya's closest friend at Cocolia's orphanage. ~!Her alter ego, Hei Seele Vollerei (黑希儿·芙乐艾), has control of her True Stigmata's power. Hei Seele's personality is drastically different from Seele's and is initially ruthless and unkind, but this later on changes as she learns to care for Seele, and eventually even her friends. name: Shinichi Katori
description: He is a spontaneous boy who appears whenever love advice is needed. He is from class 3-5 and is the president of the drama club. Shinichi is a quirky and upbeat teenager. name: Si-Eun Yeon
description: __Height__: 158 cm (5'2") __Shuttle Patch Website Ranking:__ ~!8th!~ The central protagonist of Weak Hero. Currently a first year at Eunjang High School in Class 1-5, and also attends Hero Cram School in the afternoons. Known by the epithet of "Eunjang's White Mamba", he is notorious for his extremely dirty fighting tactics and uncannily reserved nature.

name: Yumemi Hoshino
description: Yumemi is a goodhearted but extremely talkative gynoid attendant of an abandoned planetarium; she is designed to look like a young girl. Yumemi is slightly damaged and completely unaware of the changes that have occurred in the past 30 years, as none of the facilities and databases that she connects to exist anymore. name: Chastille Lillvqvist
nativeName: シャスティル・リルクヴィスト
description: A woman who is a member of the Angelic Knights, a force of the Chivalric Order that dispenses justice against sorcerers in the name of God.

name: Haruka Kotoura
description: A girl with the power to read minds. Her power has caused her harsh experiences since she was a child, so she's closed off her heart to others. But the truth is that she's still just a normal, weak girl who longs to be with someone. Her heart begins to open after her encounter with Manabe and the others. Even though she can read minds, she's not used to experiencing sexual thoughts, so she's always getting flustered by Manabe. (Source: ANN)

name: Inko-chan
description: Ryuuji Takasu's parakeet. Her name is Japanese for parakeet. Though apparently healthy, she sometimes looks sickly. Despite struggling to say her simple name (a running gag throughout the series), she has a good understanding of human speech and can interact with her owners and pronounce words much more difficult than her name. She seems to be mentally inept.

name: Kousetsu
description: Ninja of Iga Village. She always has her guard up and makes sure [Ittoki](https://anilist.co/character/276197/Ittoki-Sakuraba) keeps up with his responsibilities and doesn't slack off. ~!It is later revealed that she is the daughter of [Kidou Minobe](https://anilist.co/character/283067).!~ ~!There is a chip in her brain that gives Koga the ability to control her mind, which they use to make her kill [Yumika](https://anilist.co/character/276198/Yumika-Sakuraba).!~

name: Krebskulm
description: 《Demon Lord of the Soul, Krebskulm》 is the ruler of the Fallen (Demonic Beings). ~!She was once one being with the other Demon Lords but were split apart after being defeated by God. She was sealed in Rem Galleu's ancestor and was passed down from mother to daughter up to Rem.!~

name: Vicious
description: It's all in the name with Vicious: he is ruthless, bloodthirsty, cunning and ambitious, willing to do anything in order to secure a position of power. He is a member of the Red Dragon Crime Syndicate in Tharsis, and is often referred to or depicted as a venomous snake.
